name: M365 Legacy Authentication Sign-ins Detected
description: Identifies sign-ins using legacy authentication protocols that should be blocked
query: SELECT id, user_principal_name, client_app_used, created_datetime, ip_address FROM entra_sign_ins WHERE client_app_used IN ('Exchange ActiveSync', 'Other clients', 'IMAP', 'POP', 'Authenticated SMTP')
remediation: Block legacy authentication using Conditional Access policies and disable basic authentication protocols.
